strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role aligns with required AI agent development skill
Strong testing/TDD background including authored test frameworks and workshops, matching Vitest/quality focus
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear)
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in primary/secondary stack

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of fullstack engineering experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing discipline, and current hands-on AI-agent/MCP work that directly aligns with the role's automation tooling focus. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin, and cloud/Kubernetes depth is only partially evidenced, but the overall engineering breadth, architecture exposure, and craftsmanship orientation fit the Senior Fullstack profile well.
